why: Protocol 775 Play clientbound official packet table assigns minecraft:boss_event to packet id 0x09, and the official ClientboundBossEventPacket.createRemovePacket(UUID) fixture encodes a context-free remove-operation body as UUID plus operation enum with no additional body. Stevenarella must dispatch and fully consume that official frame body for packet-support evidence.
what: The exact Rust oracle test panicked in stevenarella/protocol/src/protocol/versions/v26_1_2.rs with bad packet id 0x9 in Clientbound Play, so Stevenarella did not dispatch the official Play clientbound boss_event packet id.
